metadata.title: Stock And Crypto Tracker - AI-Powered Market Clarity
metadata.description: AI-powered market analysis for stocks and crypto. Get clear signals without the noise, delivered directly to Telegram.

hero.headline: Clarity for Stock and Crypto Markets.
hero.subheadline: Stock And Crypto Tracker scans global markets 24/7 and explains technical conditions in plain language. No hype. No noise. Just clear market context delivered on Telegram.

problem.heading: The market moves fast. Most signals don't.
problem.paragraph1: Retail investors are flooded with charts, indicators, and "buy" calls.
problem.paragraph2: By the time most signals reach you, the opportunity is often gone.

solution.heading: One AI. One clear view of the market.

bullets.explain: Explains what's happening and what to watch
bullets.deliver: Sends alerts directly to your Telegram account

solution.tagline: No dashboards. No downloads. No complexity.

step1.title: We monitor the market
step1.description: Our AI analyzes price action, volume, and technical patterns across stocks and crypto.

step2.title: We detect meaningful setups
step2.description: Only when conditions matter. No constant spam.

step3.title: You get clear context
step3.description: Signal type, time horizon, confidence level, and risk to watch.

step4.title: Delivered on Telegram
step4.description: Access everything via your own Telegram account.

features.heading: What you get with Stock And Crypto Tracker
features.tagline: Built for investors who value discipline over hype.

trust.heading: Built for clarity. Designed responsibly.
trust.paragraph1: Stock And Crypto Tracker provides technical market analysis for educational purposes only.
trust.paragraph2: We do not provide financial advice, portfolio recommendations, or guarantees.
trust.paragraph3: Always apply your own risk management.

finalCta.heading: Get clarity without the noise.
finalCta.subtext: No credit card. No app download.

footer.copyright: © {year} Stock And Crypto Tracker. All rights reserved.
